name: Vereshchaka- Pork and Beetroot Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into cubes and brown in the bacon fat or with streaky bacon.
2. Remove the meat from the pan and lightly brown the onions in the remaining fat.
3. Transfer the meat, onions, and bacon to a casserole dish.
